capabilities.name: GitHub: Check Repository Initialized
capabilities.description: Check if a GitHub repository has been initialised (presence of an initial commit and essential files).

capabilities.name: GitHub: Compare Commits
capabilities.description: Compare two commits or refs within a repository, returning per-file change statistics and metadata.

capabilities.name: GitHub: Fetch File
capabilities.description: Fetch the contents of a file from a repository at a specific ref (branch, tag, or commit).

capabilities.name: GitHub: Fetch Commit
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata and details of a specific commit within a repository.

capabilities.name: GitHub: Search Repository Files
capabilities.description: Search within a repository for files matching specific keywords or patterns.

capabilities.name: GitHub: Create Pull Request
capabilities.description: Create a new pull request to merge changes from one branch into another.

capabilities.name: GitHub: Merge Pull Request
capabilities.description: Merge an existing pull request into its target branch, adhering to repository policies.
